question: My neighbor keeps parking in my spot. I have asked nicely three times. What do you recommend as next steps?

My landlord refuses to fix the heating. What is the most efficient way to resolve this?
Two departments in our company cannot agree on budget allocation. Please outline your recommended intervention.
My business partner wants to take the company in a direction I disagree with. What are my options?
